title: .Net/Angular Developer - LINQ/Entity Framework
skills: .Net, AngularJS, C#, .Net Core, REST API, API Integration, Microservices Architecture, LINQ, Entity Framework, WebAPI
description:
Description :
- Excellent working experience in Angular JS.
- Proven experience as a .NET Developer or Application Developer.
- Working knowledge of .NET languages - C# and HTML5/CSS3.
- Hands on experience in Typescript, JavaScript or similar scripting language.
- Excellent troubleshooting and communication skills (Both Written and Verbal) are must. Attention to detail.
- Familiarity with architecture styles/APIs (REST, RPC).
- Understanding of Agile methodologies.
Role Overview :
We are looking for a skilled .NET + Angular Developer to design, develop, and maintain scalable web applications. The ideal candidate should have strong experience in backend development using .NET / .NET Core and frontend development using Angular, with exposure to cloud platforms and Agile practices.
Key Responsibilities :
- Design, develop, and maintain web applications using .NET / .NET Core and Angular
- Build RESTful APIs and integrate them with Angular-based UI components
- Develop responsive, user-friendly SPA (Single Page Applications)
- Work on microservices architecture and backend integrations
- Write clean, maintainable, and high-performance code following best practices
- Perform code reviews, debugging, and performance optimization
- Collaborate with cross-functional teams including UI/UX, QA, DevOps, and Product Owners
- Participate in Agile/Scrum ceremonies (Sprint Planning, Daily Standups, Reviews)
- Support deployment and CI/CD pipelines using DevOps tools
- Ensure application security, scalability, and reliability
Required Skills & Qualifications :
- 8+ years of experience in software development (adjust as needed)
- Strong experience with .NET / .NET Core, C#, ASP.NET, Web API
- Hands-on experience with Angular (v8+), TypeScript, HTML, CSS
- Experience building and consuming RESTful APIs
- Solid understanding of Microservices Architecture
- Strong experience with SQL Server / PostgreSQL / relational databases
- Experience with Entity Framework / LINQ
- Familiarity with Azure or AWS cloud services
- Experience with Azure DevOps / CI-CD pipelines
- Knowledge of Agile / Scrum methodologies
Nice to Have (Good-to-Have Skills) :
- Experience with Docker & Kubernetes
- Knowledge of RabbitMQ / Service Bus / Event-driven architecture
- Exposure to DevSecOps practices
- Experience with GraphQL
- Understanding of SRE / monitoring tools
- Exposure to AI / Azure OpenAI / Generative AI integration
Education :
Bachelors or Masters degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or related field
raw_fields_json:

title: .Net API Engineer
skills: .Net, Redux, Microservices Architecture, TypeScript, API, RESTful API, Applications Implementation, Microservices Implementation
description:
Company Overview :
Nasugroup is a leading technology solutions provider specializing in crafting innovative and scalable software for the financial services and healthcare industries. We empower our clients with cutting-edge applications that drive efficiency, enhance customer experiences, and ensure regulatory compliance. Our collaborative and growth-oriented culture fosters an environment where talented individuals can thrive and make a significant impact.
Role Overview :
As an API Engineer at Nasugroup, you will be instrumental in designing, developing, and maintaining robust and scalable APIs that power our core products and services. You will collaborate closely with product managers, front-end developers, and other stakeholders to translate business requirements into well-defined API specifications and implement them using .Net technologies. Your work will directly impact the performance, reliability, and security of our platform, ensuring a seamless experience for our users.
Key Responsibilities :
- Design and develop RESTful APIs using .Net framework and .Net Core, adhering to industry best practices and security standards.
- Implement microservices architecture patterns to build scalable and resilient applications.
- Collaborate with front-end developers to integrate APIs with user interfaces, ensuring a smooth and efficient user experience.
- Write unit and integration tests to ensure the quality and reliability of the APIs.
- Participate in code reviews to maintain code quality and share knowledge with team members.
- Troubleshoot and resolve API-related issues in a timely manner.
- Contribute to the development of API documentation and guidelines.
- Optimize API performance and scalability to meet the growing demands of our platform.
Required Skillset :
- Demonstrated ability to design and develop RESTful APIs using .Net framework and .Net Core.
- Proven experience in implementing microservices architecture patterns.
- Strong proficiency in TypeScript and experience with Redux for state management.
- Solid understanding of API security principles and best practices.
- Excellent problem-solving and debugging skills.
- Strong communication and collaboration skills to work effectively with cross-functional teams.
- Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or a related field.
Skills :
- .Net, Redux
- Amazon API Gateway (Good to have)
- Experience developing serverless and step functions(serverless orchestration)
- Microservice development
- Solid understanding of Redux Toolkit for state management
- Typescript is plus
raw_fields_json:

title: .Net Application Architect - C# Programming
skills: C#, OOPS, .Net, SQL, NoSQL, Backend Architecture, Server Side Component
description:
Description :
Role : Net Architect Full Stack.
Location : Bangalore/Coimbatore.
- As this is architect role we expect candidate to design complex systems.
- Also candidate has to be hands on ready to implement code as needed.
- At least 11 years of experience in architecture, design and building enterprise and distributed applications.
- Strong hands-on experience with C# and object-oriented programming.
- Deep understanding of SOLID principles and design patterns.
- Extensive experience in building applications with microservices architecture.
- Hands on experience in implementing SAGA, circuit breaker patterns.
- Extensive experience in building event driven systems.
- Hands on experience with message brokers like Azure Service bus, Event Grid, event Hubs, Kafka, RabbitMQ etc.
- Deep understanding of integration design patterns.
- Extensive experience in Integration and Access Management strategies.
- Extensive experience with Cloud platforms like Azure, AWS, GCP.
- Azure Preferred.
- Experience with Docker, Kubernetes, and CI/CD pipelines.
- Familiarity with monitoring, logging, and alerting frameworks (e.g., Prometheus, Grafana, ELK Stack).
- Hands on experience with both SQL and NoSQL databases.
- Experience with Graph databases and GraphQL is a plus.
- Hands on experience with Python is a plus.
- Hands on experience with AI and ML tools and concepts is a plus.
- Should have strong verbal and written communication skills.

Description :

Role : Net Architect Full Stack.

Location : Bangalore/Coimbatore.

- As this is architect role we expect candidate to design complex systems.

- Also candidate has to be hands on ready to implement code as needed.

- At least 11 years of experience in architecture, design and building enterprise and distributed applications.

- Strong hands-on experience with C# and object-oriented programming.

- Deep understanding of SOLID principles and design patterns.

- Extensive experience in building applications with microservices architecture.

- Hands on experience in implementing SAGA, circuit breaker patterns.

- Extensive experience in building event driven systems.

- Hands on experience with message brokers like Azure Service bus, Event Grid, event Hubs, Kafka, RabbitMQ etc.

- Deep understanding of integration design patterns.

- Extensive experience in Integration and Access Management strategies.

- Extensive experience with Cloud platforms like Azure, AWS, GCP.

- Azure Preferred.

- Experience with Docker, Kubernetes, and CI/CD pipelines.

- Familiarity with monitoring, logging, and alerting frameworks (e.g., Prometheus, Grafana, ELK Stack).

- Hands on experience with both SQL and NoSQL databases.

- Experience with Graph databases and GraphQL is a plus.

- Hands on experience with Python is a plus.

- Hands on experience with AI and ML tools and concepts is a plus.

- Should have strong verbal and written communication skills.
